◎片　　名　Lot in Sodom
◎年　　代　1933

◎简　　介  

　　In LOT IN SODOM, distortion is often used to keep reality, or rather its appearance, from disturbing the film's mood. And in the final scene distortion makes Lot's daughter seem not only different but formidable as she grasps the wine cup. - J.S. Watson, Jr.
